careerSummary.company: Yume Technology, Inc. (now OpenUp IT Engineer, Inc.)
Shizuoka University, Faculty of Engineering, Mechanical Engineering (withdrew)

overview.ja: Currently serving as a Technical Account Manager (TAM) for CloudFastener, a cloud security operations support product, providing incident response, CSPM, vulnerability management, WAF operations, and consulting on AI/governance organizational structures for public clouds including AWS. Since January 2026, I have also served as manager of the TAM team, taking on team management duties (while continuing to support customers directly as a playing manager). Building on experience in design, implementation, and consulting cultivated as an AWS Solutions Architect, I provide support in security and governance.Key areas of professional experience include:- Customer support and team management as a TAM for CloudFastener, a cloud security operations support product- Design, implementation, and operation of AWS infrastructure for financial systems compliant with PCI DSS- Support for designing and building network and security architecture for a data analytics platform at a major points-service company- IaC transformation of infrastructure using CloudFormation and Terraform- Consulting and guideline implementation support for AWS security and governance in multi-account environments for enterprise clients- Design and build support for AWS infrastructure based on blockchain technology

companies.name: Cyber Security Cloud, Inc.
companies.businessDescription: Development and provision of cybersecurity services (cloud-based WAF "Attack Blocker-kun", multi-cloud WAF operation service "WafCharm", vulnerability management cloud "SIDfm", etc.)

projects.title: Technical Account Manager (TAM) for CloudFastener
projects.overview: Supporting customers' cloud security operations as Technical Account Manager for CloudFastener, a cloud security operations support product
tasks: Supported incident response for public clouds including AWS
Consulted on cloud security operations including CSPM, vulnerability management, and WAF operations
Consulted on organizational structures for AI and governance
Improved operational efficiency using AI agents such as Claude Code, Gemini, and Codex

projects.title: TAM Team Manager
projects.overview: Managed the TAM team to ensure smooth team operations (continuing to support customers directly as a playing manager)
tasks: Managed TAM team members and drove operational efficiency improvements
Continued providing technical support to customers as a playing manager

companies.name: Classmethod, Inc.
companies.businessDescription: Cloud (AWS, etc.) technical consulting, development, and related services

projects.title: AWS Operations Support
projects.overview: AWS operations support accompanying the launch of a CCoE (Cloud Center of Excellence) team
tasks: Supported updates to guidelines for company-wide AWS usage standardization
Designed a governance environment for security, user, and network management across multiple accounts without using Organizations
Supported the design of network environments involving dedicated line connections (Direct Connect, Transit Gateway, etc.)
Supported the introduction of logic to improve security operation efficiency

projects.title: Technical Advisor
projects.overview: Customer support equivalent to a Technical Account Manager (TAM)
tasks: Resolved technical challenges in customers' AWS environments
Supported QA for email feature implementation in a customer service
Provided design support for building an SPA (Single Page Application)
Designed a CI/CD solution for a development environment
Hosted regular private study sessions on AWS services

projects.title: AWS Usage Guideline Development Support / Account & Security Implementation Support
projects.overview: Developed AWS usage guidelines and supported account/security design in connection with migrating a data analytics platform to AWS
tasks: Designed and built a solution ensuring security compliant with personal information handling requirements
Designed and built a best-practice account structure using Control Tower and Organizations
Supported the design of network environments involving dedicated line connections (Direct Connect, Transit Gateway, etc.)

additionalActivities: Support for improving multi-account operational efficiency
